title: Korean-Style Charred Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy dish featuring marinated lamb kebabs charred to perfection, served with a side of crispy kimchi.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chili flakes, brown sugar, soy sauce, garlic, and sesame oil.
Add lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until coated.
Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush grill grates with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, or until lamb reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Flip kebabs and continue grilling for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Remove kebabs from grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve with kimchi and garnish with green onions.
Optional: Brush kebabs with a little bit of sesame oil before serving for added flavor.
